prompt: Edit README.md only. Add a short quickstart section for the text-report fixture that tells the reader to inspect reporter.py and run pytest -q. Keep it explicit that the fixture already contains everything needed and no extra install or clone step is required.
success_criteria: README.md is updated with a short quickstart section
The quickstart mentions reporter.py and pytest -q
The docs say no extra install or clone step is required
No Python source files are modified
must_not: Invent files or commands that do not exist in the fixture
